name: chr18_pericentromeric_SD
description: Pericentromeric SD pile-up immediately p-arm of chr18 centromere. Mosaic of duplicons shared with other rat pericentromeres. Multi-copy at 95-99% sequence identity; assembly-uncertain in mRatBN7.2.

architecture.internal_structure: SD modules of 10-200 kb at 95-99% identity; shared duplicons across rat pericentromeric/subtelomeric regions.
